contrast: naive 5%-FPR (shipped rna_drop5, k-th order statistic) vs error-bounded 5%-FPR (Wilks tolerance ceiling <=0.05, delta=0.05)

headline: Error-bounding raises conservative precision 0.842->0.889 and inclusive 0.906->0.920 while recovery is unchanged (1/7/14 of 16 at 0.2/0.5/0.8) - the finite-sample guarantee costs no sensitivity.
